Label.text: Static table v1: header, column widths, zebra rows, grid lines, and cell padding.

DataTable.rows: Ava Carter|Product Designer|APAC|91;Noah Kim|Frontend Engineer|NA|88;Mia Chen|Data Analyst|EMEA|94;Liam Patel|QA Engineer|APAC|86;Emma Garcia|PM|NA|90;Ethan Rossi|Backend Engineer|EMEA|89;Sophia Diaz|UX Researcher|LATAM|87;Lucas Brown|DevOps Engineer|NA|92
